prompt: Create a centered kawaii illustration of a fluffy chubby kitten on a plain white background, drawn in a soft hand-sketched watercolor and colored-pencil style. The kitten has warm light beige and cream fur, with beige patches on the top of the head, outer cheeks, sides of the body, and a fluffy curled tail on the right, while the face and belly are mostly cream. Give it oversized triangular ears with pale pink inner ears, tiny black oval eyes, a small black smiling cat mouth, three short whisker lines on each side, and soft pink blush on both cheeks. The body should be rounded and plush like a squat stuffed animal, sitting front-facing with two tiny curved front paws on the belly and two round feet at the bottom, each foot showing exactly 4 pink paw pads. Use rough charcoal-like dark gray outlines, loose furry strokes around the edges, translucent watercolor shading, and a gentle pastel palette. Keep the composition minimal, with no text, no props, no background scenery, and plenty of white space around the single kitten.
